summary: Knowledge Base rebuild testing completed. Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including Schools page, Detail page, search, filters, smart chips, pagination, and Add to Board functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: All KB routes working correctly - new routes at /api/knowledge-base/* and legacy at /api/athlete/knowledge/*
953 universities in database with rich data (939 with scorecard, 852 with logos)
Match scoring algorithm working - University of Texas shows 99% match for Emma Chen (D1/D2 division, South/Southeast regions)
Add to Board correctly creates program in pipeline and seeds coaching staff
Admin KB jobs endpoint properly restricts access to director/admin roles only
Filter panel working with division/region/conference filters
Search functionality returns correct filtered results
Pagination working correctly (50 items per page, 19 pages for 953 schools)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing 953 universities from BSON import.
context_for_next_testing_agent: KB rebuild fully verified. All routes tested: GET /api/knowledge-base (pagination, filters), GET /api/knowledge-base/filters, GET /api/knowledge-base/school/{domain} (with auth for match score), POST /api/knowledge-base/add-to-board, GET /api/suggested-schools (match-ranked), GET /api/admin/kb-jobs (admin only). Legacy routes also tested: /api/athlete/knowledge/search, /api/athlete/knowledge/{domain}, /api/athlete/knowledge/{domain}/add-to-pipeline. Frontend tested: SchoolsPage with search bar, smart chips (All Schools, Dream Schools D1, Strong Match 80%+, Close to Home, Strong Academics), filter panel, school grid, top match banner. SchoolDetailPage with hero card, match score ring, add to board button, key statistics, program overview, coaching staff, school profile, admissions, financial sections.

Backend_APIs.GET_knowledge_base_school: PASS - Returns full school detail with scorecard
Backend_APIs.GET_knowledge_base_school_auth: PASS - Returns match_score (49% for Stanford) and on_board status
Backend_APIs.POST_add_to_board: PASS - Adds school to pipeline, seeds coaches
Backend_APIs.GET_suggested_schools: PASS - Returns 20 match-ranked suggestions (top: University of Texas 99%)
Backend_APIs.GET_admin_kb_jobs: PASS - Returns stats (953 schools, 939 scorecard, 852 logos) and job list
Backend_APIs.POST_admin_kb_jobs_run: PASS - Returns 400 for unknown jobs, 403 for non-admin
Backend_APIs.Division_filter: PASS - D1 filter returns D1 schools only
Backend_APIs.Region_filter: PASS - South filter returns South region schools
Backend_APIs.Legacy_detail: PASS - /api/athlete/knowledge/{domain} returns school with in_pipeline flag

Frontend_SchoolsPage.smart_chips: PASS - All Schools 953, Dream Schools (D1) 11, Strong Match (80%+) 20, Close to Home, Strong Academics 20
Frontend_SchoolsPage.filter_panel: PASS - Division (D1/D2/D3/NAIA), Region (10 options), Conference filters
Frontend_SchoolsPage.filter_apply_clear: PASS - Apply and Clear buttons work
Frontend_SchoolsPage.top_match_banner: PASS - Shows #1 Match: University of Texas with 99% score and match reasons
Frontend_SchoolsPage.school_grid: PASS - 50 school cards with match scores, divisions, conferences
Frontend_SchoolsPage.school_card_components: PASS - Logo, name, division badge, region, conference, match score %, match reasons, Add to Board, Details buttons
Frontend_SchoolsPage.pagination: PASS - Showing X of 953, Prev/Next buttons

Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.school_hero: PASS - Dark gradient card with school name, division, conference, region
Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.match_reasons_tags: PASS - Division Match, Preferred Region, Academics, Athletics, Scholarship, Strong Academic Fit
Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.add_to_board_btn: PASS - Shows 'Add to Board' or 'On Your Board' state
Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.key_statistics: PASS - Tuition, Acceptance Rate, Undergrads, Graduation Rate
Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.program_overview: PASS - Division, Conference, Program Website, Academic Website, Recruiting Questionnaire, Social links
Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.coaching_staff: PASS - Coach cards with name, title, email
Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.school_profile: PASS - Graduation Rate, Retention Rate, Student-Faculty Ratio, Undergrad Students
Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.admissions: PASS - Average GPA, ACT, SAT, Acceptance Rate
Frontend_SchoolDetailPage.financial: PASS - Avg Annual Cost, Tuition In-State, Median Debt, Median Earnings

Add_to_Board_Flow.from_list_page: PASS - Button changes from 'Add to Board' to 'On Board'
Add_to_Board_Flow.from_detail_page: PASS - Button shows 'On Your Board' for added schools
Add_to_Board_Flow.updates_dashboard: PASS - Schools Tracked count increases after adding
